title: Carry Cake and Pie (BTA 7.3)
description: Cake and pumpkin pie for you!
body:
# Carry Cake and Pie Cake and pumpkin pie for you! > **Important** > - Required [Babric](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo/releases) to run the mod. > - Required [HalpLibe](https://modrinth.com/mod/halplibe) in BTA version 7.1 and later. ## Features - `Shift` + `Right Click` at a cake or a pumpkin pie to carry it around. ## Compatibility Table | Client | Server | Behavior | |--------|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | ✅ | ❌ | You will eat the original cake/pie, and will pick it up _visually_.
(meaning you are not actually holding it, it's just a visual glitch) | | ❌ | ✅ | You will pick it up. | | ✅ | ✅ | You will pick it up. |
